description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, open-plan layout. The structure features large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor connectivity. The front includes a driveway leading to a garage, while the rear opens to a private backyard with a swimming pool and patio area. The exterior is finished in white and light gray, complemented by green landscaping and a privacy fence. Minimalist landscaping with trimmed grass and a few shrubs enhances the clean, contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes horizontal lines, open spaces, and a strong connection to the outdoors.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a backyard pool, finished in white and gray with minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage entrance, and main entryway, with a large green lawn and privacy fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open-plan interior, large windows, and the backyard pool area with patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, patio, and extensive glass doors opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and additional green space, with less visibility of the pool.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
